settings.subtitle: Glutathione + Hyaluronic Acid
settings.description: A nourishing brightening cream designed to improve uneven tone, reduce dullness, and support skin repair. It helps fade the look of dark spots, restore radiance, and leave skin smoother and healthier with consistent use.

settings.label: GOOD FOR:
settings.value: All skin types, especially dull and uneven skin

settings.label: FEELS LIKE:
settings.value: A rich, smooth cream that absorbs comfortably into skin

settings.label: LOOKS LIKE:
settings.value: Brighter, clearer skin with improved tone and texture

settings.label: SMELLS LIKE:
settings.value: A soft, fresh scent with a soothing finish

settings.label: FYI:
settings.value: Non-Greasy • Deep Hydration • Daily Use • Brightening Care

settings.title:

A cream for EVEN TONE + HYDRATION + RADIANT SKIN.
HONEY & GLUTATHIONE

settings.title: ALPHA ARBUTIN & KOJIC ACID DIPALMITATE

settings.title: what's inside
settings.intro: A nourishing cream that brightens, repairs, and hydrates skin for a clearer, more even complexion.
settings.footer_text: also made with Centella Asiatica, Niacinamide, Vitamin C, Hyaluronic Acid, Glycerin, Vitamin E, and Amla Extract for hydration, skin barrier support, and smooth texture

settings.description: SAID THEIR SKIN LOOKED MORE RADIANT
SAID THEIR SKIN FELT MORE HYDRATED
SAID THEIR SKIN APPEARED MORE EVEN
SAID THEY NOTICED IMPROVED SKIN CLARITY

settings.footnote: Based on a 2-week consumer perception study with consistent daily use.

settings.question: Can I use this cream every day?
settings.answer: Yes, it is suitable for daily use, both morning and evening.

settings.question: Is it suitable for dull and uneven skin?
settings.answer: Yes, it is designed to target dullness, pigmentation, and uneven tone.

settings.question: Will it feel heavy on my skin?
settings.answer: No, it absorbs well while still providing deep hydration and comfort.

settings.question: Can I use it with other skincare products?
settings.answer: Yes, it works well with serums, toners, and sunscreen.

settings.question: Do I need sunscreen while using this?
settings.answer: Yes, sunscreen is essential during the day to protect and maintain results.

settings.title: FAQ
